name: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc.
summary: . Company and Organization TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. is a commercial real estate finance company externally managed by TPG RE Finance Trust Management, L.P., an affiliate of TPG. Our principal executive offices are located at 888 Seventh Avenue, 35 th Floor, New York, New York 10106.
